title: arch btw
description: My personal Mod Pack for running Minecraft while still being pretty optimized and fancy
body:
My personal Mod Pack for running Minecraft while still being pretty optimized and fancy

It is meant to be extremely fast and smooth and just work out of the box

- Multiple optimization mods
- Smooth scrolling mod
- RyoamicLights mod so when you hold a glowing item like torch it glows
- Really fast resource pack loading/reloading

### Why is the Mod Pack named arch btw?
Because I didn't know what else to name the mod pack so I just named it after the Linux Distribution I use, it doesn't have anything to do with the modpack
